name: Stuffed Zucchini Italiano
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Italian Style Bread Crumbs (divided usage)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Trim ends of zucchini and cut in half lengthwise.
3. Carefully scoop out centers, leaving a 1/4-inch thick shell. Chop the pulp; set aside.
4. In a large skillet, brown ground beef and drain fat.
5. Stir in reserved zucchini pulp, bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, oregano, salt, pepper, and 1/2 cup marinara sauce into the meat mixture; mix well.
6. Place zucchini shells in a shallow baking pan.
7. Spoon meat mixture into each shell.
8. Pour remaining marinara sauce over and around the zucchini.
9. Cover and bake until zucchini shells are tender, about 30 to 35 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
11. Bake uncovered until cheese melts, about 5 minutes.
